title: uva-ursi patula
intro: Uva-ursi patula, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and North America, characterized by its small white flowers and red or purple berries. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of arbutin. The health benefits of uva-ursi patula include its ability to support urinary tract health, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Uva-ursi patula is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
